title: pimpinella squamosa
intro: Pimpinella squamosa, also known as Ziran or Chinese burnet, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Pimpinella squamosa can be found in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and are often used to promote digestion and relieve symptoms of the common cold.
